summary: Betty's sound‑board transfer sounds muffled and unbalanced, with no standout musical moments mentioned in the reviews.
review: The few fan comments focus on the poor audio fidelity of this Betty‑sourced soundboard – listeners note a heavy side bias and overall muddiness compared to other transfers. No specific songs or performance highlights are cited, leaving the musical quality of the show unaddressed.

ai_rating.rationale: Two high‑star reviews lack substantive commentary, while a low‑star review highlights serious recording flaws; with limited performance data the overall rating settles around an average mark.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Unbalanced left/right bias, muffled sound, does not match previous transfers; reviewers suggest commercial release sounds far better.
